schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
schemes.description: Direct income support to eligible farmer families in three annual installments.
schemes.eligibility: Land-holding farmer families with valid Aadhaar and bank account.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.description: Crop insurance protection for notified crops against yield losses.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
schemes.benefits: Low premium insurance and claim support.

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Soil testing and nutrient recommendations for better productivity.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers.
schemes.benefits: Balanced fertilizer usage and lower input costs.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Short-term affordable credit for cultivation and allied activities.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, tenant farmers, SHGs, and allied sector farmers.
schemes.benefits: Timely low-interest credit and subvention on prompt repayment.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.description: Irrigation efficiency and micro-irrigation promotion.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible cultivable landholders as per state norms.

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
schemes.description: Cluster-based organic farming and certification support.
schemes.eligibility: Farmer groups willing to adopt organic methods.
schemes.benefits: Support for inputs, certification, and value chain.

schemes.name: National Mission on Natural Farming (NMNF)
schemes.description: Promotion of chemical-free natural farming practices.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers onboarded via state agriculture departments.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY-RAFTAAR)
schemes.description: Supports agriculture innovation, infrastructure, and startups.
schemes.eligibility: Approved project beneficiaries under state plans.

schemes.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
schemes.description: Subsidized agricultural machinery and custom hiring support.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, and cooperatives as per state norms.

schemes.name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
schemes.description: Unified digital agricultural market for better price discovery.
schemes.eligibility: Registered farmers via participating mandis.
schemes.benefits: Wider market access and transparent bidding.

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
schemes.description: Medium-long term debt financing for post-harvest management infrastructure.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, PACS, cooperatives, startups and agri-entrepreneurs.
schemes.benefits: Interest subvention and credit guarantee support.

schemes.name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.description: Voluntary pension scheme for small and marginal farmers.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers aged 18-40 years with up to 2 hectares land.
schemes.benefits: Assured monthly pension at old age.

schemes.name: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME)
schemes.description: Support for micro food processing units and value addition.
schemes.eligibility: Individual micro enterprises, SHGs, FPOs, cooperatives.

schemes.name: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
schemes.description: Per-acre investment support for each crop season.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible land-owning farmers in Telangana.
schemes.benefits: Seasonal DBT support for farm input expenses.

schemes.name: KALIA Scheme
schemes.description: Support for small and marginal farmers, sharecroppers, and landless laborers.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible Odisha beneficiaries under state criteria.
schemes.benefits: Cultivation support, livelihood aid, and insurance support.

schemes.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
schemes.description: State support scheme for investment and livelihood assistance.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible farmers and tenant cultivators in Andhra Pradesh.

schemes.name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana
schemes.description: State top-up support for PM-KISAN beneficiaries.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible PM-KISAN beneficiaries in Maharashtra.

schemes.name: Bhavantar Bhugtan Yojana
schemes.description: Compensation for difference between market and benchmark support price.
schemes.eligibility: Registered farmers selling notified crops in designated mandis.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Krishi Ashirwad Yojana
schemes.description: Per-acre support to reduce seasonal farm input burden.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible landholding farmers in Jharkhand.

schemes.name: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation (KALIA top-up)
schemes.description: Supplementary state support for livelihood resilience among farmers.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible farmer households under updated state list.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Kalyan Yojana
schemes.description: State income support for registered farmers in addition to central aid.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible farmer beneficiaries under state registry.

schemes.name: Gujarat Kisan Suryoday Yojana
schemes.description: Daytime quality power supply support for agricultural consumers.
schemes.eligibility: Eligible agricultural electricity consumers in notified feeders.
schemes.benefits: Reliable daytime electricity for irrigation operations.
